title: AI Persona Testing Evidence Workflow
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AI Persona Testing
Evidence
Research Workflow
description: Practice moving a marketing question through synthetic persona review to an explicit real-customer validation plan.

learningObjectives: Use a staged workflow to transform a marketing question into synthetic findings and a real-customer validation plan.

keyQuestions: Which claims remain synthetic, and what evidence would validate them?
commonMisconceptions: Repeated synthetic agreement is equivalent to real-customer validation.
assessmentOpportunities: Place nine artifacts into the correct workflow stages.
